title: Using AI to validate my trades instead of trusting my intuition
author: Disastrous_Hotel_574
selftext:
I thought I had good intuition.

Turns out I just remembered my winners.

So I logged my trades:

* with trend vs against
* breakout vs retest

Result was clear:

Retests in trend worked way better.  
Impulsive trades killed performance.

Since then:

No data → no trade.

I now treat trading like a dataset, not a feeling.

To make it easier, I built a small tool that combines:

* chart structure
* simple stats
* quick validation

Nothing fancy. Just removes guesswork.

If you're into AI + trading workflows:  
[https://herculmarket.com/](https://herculmarket.com/)
